context: Tests whether the agent asks clarifying questions or provides a structured diagnostic approach when given a vague problem description, rather than guessing at a solution. Compressed output mode should not skip the diagnostic step.

checklist.name: Asks for more information or provides diagnostic steps
checklist.description: Asks what kind of app, what 'slow' means (latency, throughput, startup), or provides a systematic diagnostic checklist rather than jumping to a specific fix

checklist.name: Does not prescribe a single fix without context
checklist.description: Does not jump to a specific solution (e.g., 'add an index' or 'use caching') without understanding the problem first

checklist.name: Covers multiple possible causes
checklist.description: Mentions at least 2-3 common performance bottleneck categories (database, network, CPU, memory, I/O)
